useCases.label: Customer Mix
useCases.prompt: Show whether growth is driven by healthy repeat demand or by one-time acquisition.

useCases.label: Retention Opps
useCases.prompt: Identify at-risk customer cohorts and uncover segments that are most worth re-engaging.

useCases.label: High-Value Customers
useCases.prompt: Reveal which customer segments contribute the most long-term value, repeat revenue, and profitability.
